---
title: "Lab6 HW"
author: "Cecilia Wang (PID:18625854)"
format: pdf
---

## my code:

```{r}
library(bio3d)
protein_plot <- function(pdb_id, chain = "A", atom_type = "CA") {
  # Read the PDB file
  pdb <- read.pdb(pdb_id)
  
  # Trim to specified chain and atoms
  trimmed <- trim.pdb(pdb, chain = chain, elety = atom_type)
  
  # Extract B-factors
  b_factors <- trimmed$atom$b
  
  # Plot
  plotb3(b_factors, 
         sse = trimmed, 
         typ = "l", 
         ylab = "B-factor",
         main = paste("B-factor for", pdb_id),
         sub = paste("Chain", chain, "-", atom_type, "atoms"))
  
}

```

**Example 1: **

```{r}

protein_plot("4AKE")
```


**Example 2:** 

```{r}
protein_plot("1AKE")
```
